bane.name: Bane
bane.description: Up to three creatures must make CHA saves or be cursed. Whenever a cursed target makes an attack roll or saving throw, it must roll a d4 and subtract the result.
bane.effect: -1d4 to attack rolls and saves for 3 targets
bane.limitations: Concentration, 1 minute, CHA save negates, 30 ft range

hex.name: Hex
hex.description: Place a curse on a creature you can see. You deal extra necrotic damage each time you hit it with an attack, and it has disadvantage on ability checks with one ability of your choice.
hex.effect: +1d6 necrotic damage per hit + disadvantage on one ability
hex.limitations: Concentration, 1 hour, 90 ft range, bonus action to cast/move

bestow curse.name: Bestow Curse
bestow curse.description: Touch a creature to curse it. Choose an effect: disadvantage on one ability's checks and saves, disadvantage on attacks against you, WIS save each turn or waste action, or your attacks deal +1d8 necrotic.
bestow curse.limitations: Touch range, concentration, 1 minute, WIS save negates

ray of enfeeblement.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
ray of enfeeblement.description: A black beam of enervating energy springs from your finger. On a hit, the target deals only half damage with weapon attacks that use Strength.
ray of enfeeblement.effect: Half damage on STR-based weapon attacks
ray of enfeeblement.limitations: Concentration, 1 minute, ranged spell attack, 60 ft range

blindness/deafness.name: Blindness/Deafness
blindness/deafness.description: You can blind or deafen a foe. The target must make a CON save or be blinded or deafened for the duration. It can repeat the save at the end of each turn.
blindness/deafness.limitations: CON save, repeatable each turn, 30 ft range, 1 minute
